title: Onboarding Playbook
objective: Onboard new linked services and leaseable capabilities using closed JSON contracts only.
trigger_conditions: A new externally owned linked service is introduced.
A new core MCP contract is introduced.
required_inputs: Template-aligned capability contract or linked-service contract metadata.
Registry entry update in linked-services, service-kernel, or capabilities.
Service-root profile declaration plus governance kernel path.
execution_steps: Prefer registering the runtime in control/registry/linked-services.v0.5.json instead of adding a new services/<service-id>/ seed folder.
Declare a service-root profile and governance kernel path using control/registry/service-kernel.v0.5.json.
Use control/registry/services.v0.1.json only for approved legacy seed preservation, never as the default onboarding path.
Register leaseable capability contracts in control/registry/capabilities.v0.4.json or, for legacy compatibility, control/registry/mcps.v0.1.json.
Complete intake-scan and pre-exec-scan before treating the service as governed.
rollback_condition: Registry and file layout drift from the fixed JSON shape.
Capabilities, temporary-link, or approval mapping are incomplete.
evidence_outputs: Validated contract bundle, link receipt, or service kernel declaration.
